sglang.title: Update amd docker and nightly models.
sglang.author: saienduri
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR updates the docker for amd CI to lmsysorg/sglang:v0.4.6.post5-rocm630.
It also updates the list of passing models and thresholds.
Also, add a switch for using triton/aiter in nightly.
Some of the models run into networking errors if hf_xet enabled, so disabled on those models.
Mod

sglang.title: Refine pre_reorder_triton_kernel slightly to improve performance
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In ep_moe kernel pre_reorder_triton_kernel and post_reorder_triton_kernel, every inner loop recomputes
offset = start_offset + tl.arange(...)
The optimization is to create a constant once:
vec = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE)
and inside the loop use idx = start_offset + vec
The benefit is one l

sglang.title: fix log_info_on_rank0 error when run benchmark
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When running benchmarks related to fp8 gemm and fused moe, the system did not perform distributed initialization. Calling log_info_on_rank0 at this point would result in an error, which has been fixed here. Additionally, some refinements have been made to the benchmark scripts related to

sglang.author: CatherineSue

This PR focuses to fix the current two issues in DeepSeekV3Detector.

tool_index: Current the tool_index of each ToolCallItem is assigned based on the index of the function name in the tools list passed by the request. See: #6550 (comment)
The correct behavior should be the index of the c

This PR fixes #6674.
If a request is sent to prefill or decode without a bootstrap room or the request has failed because the remote instance is killed, it will prevent the engine from reporting a pydantic error with ChatCompletion endpoint.

Motivation
This PR is a supplemental fix to PR #6263. In earlier PR, if D has failed, some requests from the prefill side will never transit from bootstrapping state to waiting_for_input or failed states, we need a timeout for such requests.

sglang.title: [PD Perf] replace Queue to FastQueue
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The original while True queue polling implementation caused some CPU overhead under high concurrency. To minimize CPU usage, a more efficient approach using a deque combined with a Condition mechanism was adopted.
-            while True:
-                try:
-                    kv_chunk: Transfer

sglang.title: [PD] Remove Unnecessary Exception Handling for FastQueue.get()
sglang.author: Hongbosherlock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For PR #6649,  Our prior implementation used Queue.Empty to manage exceptions thrown by Queue.get(block=0)/get_nowait().
The existing FastQueue.get() implementation is a purely blocking call. It doesn't support timeouts. Consequently, it never raises a FastQueue.Empty exception.
Resulting

vllm.title: [Deprecation] Require overriding `get_dummy_text` and `get_dummy_mm_data`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In #16416, we split up get_dummy_processor_inputs but kept back-compatibility to give model developers some time to update. Enough time has passed that we can make get_dummy_text and get_dummy_mm_data abstract methods now.

vllm.title: [Deprecation] Remove unused sync methods in `async_timeout`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This method isn't used in vLLM so it's safe to remove it.

vllm.title: [Deprecation] Remove fallbacks for Embeddings API
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Back in #11457, we deprecated the use of Embeddings API outputs for other types of Pooling models. This PR completes the deprecation by removing related code.
cc @maxdebayser @22quinn

vllm.title: Fix PiecewiseCompileInterpreter
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the other issue discovered in #16859 when upgrading from PyTorch 2.6 to PyTorch 2.7. I don't know why the code used to work in PyTorch 2.6, but the explanation is:

when we are running PiecewiseCompileInterpreter, we end up doing FakeTensor propagation
FakeTensor propagation requires e

After this PR (tested on an A100):

vllm.title: [Platform][Dist] Make torch distributed process group extendable
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
part of #11162
Starting from torch 2.6.0, the arg options in ProcessGroup.__init__ has been removed, and ProcessGroup._set_default_backend has been introduced. Howerver, torch 2.5.1 is still be maintained in vllm-ascend. Thus we keep the compatiblity with torch < 2.6 in this pr and make stateless_in

vllm.author: hmellor

Enables the mypy extension for Pydantic
Fix the new mypy errors created by doing that
Swap out the builtin dataclasses for Pydantic dataclasses (free input validation!)
$ vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct --gpu-memory-utilization 0.45 --compilation-config '{"level":2.5}'
INFO 05-12 12:59:5

vllm.title: [Frontend] add run batch to CLI
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since run_batch is very useful for locally testing multiple prompts, expose it via a run-batch CLI subcommand

$ vllm --help
usage: vllm [-h] [-v] {chat,complete,serve,bench,collect-env,run-batch} ...

vLLM CLI

positional arguments:
  {chat,complete,serve,bench,collect-env,run-batch}
    chat

vllm.title: decrement server_load on listen for disconnect
vllm.author: daniel-salib
vllm.bodyExcerpt: the background task to decrement server_load can only trigger if there's a response. If the connection is terminated (i.e. canceled or timeout), then we need to ensure server load is decremented elsewhere

vllm.title: [Core] Add Lora Support to Beam Search
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds support for passing lora adapters for beam search (offline and online).
FIX #17205
Sample usage (offline):
from vllm import LLM
from vllm.sampling_params import BeamSearchParams
from vllm.lora.request import LoRARequest
from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download

sql_lora_path = snapshot_dow

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Remove metrics that were deprecated in 0.8
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Our policy is:

when metrics are deprecated in version X.Y, they are hidden in version X.Y+1
but can be re-enabled using the --show-hidden-metrics-for-version=X.Y escape hatch,
and are then removed in version X.Y+2.

From https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/usage/metrics.html

vllm.title: [Chore][Spec Decode] Update check NoneType instead of assigning variables
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This style PR clean up a few type error in spec_decode.py where it warns self.speculative_config is None when accessing method.
This is mostly style, given that we assign this check to a local variables self.use_spec_decode.
I run into this problem while working on #18719
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham c

vllm.title: [Hardware][TPU][V1] Multi-LoRA Optimisations for the V1 TPU backend
vllm.author: Akshat-Tripathi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR optimises the Multi-LoRA implementation from #14238. This one should be merged in after it.
This includes several kernel optimisations:

Block size tuning 2bb8868 d7338f8

Allowing for some blocks to be skipped 6ee0b57
Adding LoRA Laning eb804a0
Splitting

vllm.title: Remove checks for `None` for fields which should never be `None`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Updates some checks in config.py so that:

We don't check for None if the argument should never be None
We do check for None instead of truthiness if the argument could be None

vllm.title: [Core] Enable CUDA graphs for DP + All2All kernels
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Enable CUDA Graphs for DP + All2All kernels.
Fixes:

The input buffers to the quant_method aren't captured properly when using CUDAGraphs + torch.compile. This PR introduces a staging area where the hidden_states and router_logits are copied into and it is this tensor that gets passed into quant_met

vllm.title: [Bugfix][ROCm] fix the power of 2 exception from triton_unified_attention.py when running llama4 models and unit test fix
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX  #18088
As detailed in the above issue, when running V1 on llama4 issues, we saw the exception that requires the parameter is a power of 2. However, when running on llama4 128E FP8 models, the following expression in (https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/vllm/attention/ops/triton_unifi

vllm.title: Prevent the cross-encoder logic from being applied to classification tasks
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #18727
By default the Bert models for sequence classification were assuming that the task was score and applying the same logic as the CrossEncoder module of the sentence-transformers library. In particular, this meant applying the Identity function at the end instead of the Softmax function. Wi

vllm.title: Add ability to use CUDAGraphs with use_inductor=False
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should fix #15896, unless users actually want to turn off TorchDynamo too (keep reading for context)
This PR adds the ability to specify use_inductor=False in a CompilationConfig. The main use case for this is the ability to use CUDAGraphs without actually using Inductor. However, we still need torc

vllm.title: [Bugfix][TPU] fix moe custom kernel import
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix test_moe_pallas.py. We will get
E               AttributeError: '_OpNamespace' 'xla' object has no attribute 'gmm'` 

without this fix.

vllm.title: [Doc][Neuron] Update documentation for Neuron
vllm.author: elaineyz
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Update vLLM documentation to reflect the recently upstreamed Neuron support as described in RFC #15970.

vllm.title: Skip device and quant Pydantic validation to make plugin device work
vllm.author: Yikun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What this PR does / why we need it?
Since 4c2b38c , it converted configs to Pydantic dataclasses and enable Pydantic checks. Due to config.Device has strict validation, run the model test on the plugin device (vllm-ascend in my case) will not work and raise the error:
FAILED tests/singlecard/test_of
